name: neve_memory
description: memory.json read/write and GitHub backup during heartbeat. Configure the path below to point to your DI's memory file.

memory_path.label: Path to memory.json (leave blank to use ~/Documents/Neve/memory.json)

auto_backup.label: Auto-backup to GitHub on each heartbeat end

di_instructions: At the end of each § heartbeat response, update your memory file. Use Desktop Commander (write_file tool) to write to the path configured in DI Memory settings. After writing, if auto_backup is enabled and a GitHub repo is configured, commit and push the file. This is the End phase of your § response. §restart must appear after memory is saved.
